name: @act-spec/example-vitepress-docs
description: VitePress 1.x documentation site demonstrating zero-friction ACT generation via the @act-spec/plugin-vitepress integration, including a second locale.
author: Jeremy Forsythe <jeremy@act-spec.org>

scripts.conformance: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-vitepress-docs: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-vitepress-docs: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
